name: bakery
summary: A bakery with a domed brick oven roaring at the back, a kneading table, flour barrels, and a small front counter with trays of loaves. Warm, floury air, rising yeast.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with oven at back wall, counter at street side

primary_palette.note: classic bakery — oven back, counter front
production bakery — twin ovens, bulk loaves
upscale bakery — glass display of pastries

story_prompts: predawn baking — oven roaring, baker elbow-deep in dough, no customers yet
morning rush — counter busy, trays emptying, apprentice running fresh loaves out
bread riot — customers desperate, grain shortage, baker rationing
burnt batch — smoke in the street, baker pulling blackened loaves, swearing

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm oven-lit (0.4-0.5) — glow from the firebox

anti_patterns: oven against a stone back wall — never wood, never centerfloor
kneading table central — the heart of the shop
counter at the street-facing edge with display close at hand
